source_of_truth: Thaumcraft 4.2.3.5 ConfigRecipes.java runtime registrations with loop expansion + embedded original recipe index + MCP 1.7.10 field mappings + explicit 1.19.2 de-metadata registry map
strict_rule: Promote only when result metadata/NBT, catalyst, ordered components or shaped keys, aspects, instability and every legacy field/metadata mapping have an explicit runtime path.

promoted.evidence: blockTaint meta2 -> flesh_block; itemGolemPlacer meta4 -> tc4_golem_flesh; Humanus/Motus/Spiritus 8
blockCosmeticOpaque meta2 count8; glass/woodenDevice meta6/brain; Aqua5 Ordo10 Terra5 Ignis5
blockMetalDevice meta14 count2; iron/balanced shard; Ignis8 Ordo8
blockMetalDevice meta2; relay meta14/greatwood rod meta0/iron; Ignis16 Ordo16 Aer16
blockJar meta3; obsidian/jar meta0/blaze powder; Aqua5 Perditio15
plankWood -> #minecraft:planks and legacy wooden trapdoor; Aer5 Ordo3 Perditio3
arcane stone/crucible/furnace exact metadata aliases; Ignis5 Aqua5
tube meta0 + resource meta8 filter; Aqua5 Ordo16
tube meta0/alembic meta1/alchemical construct meta9/piston; Aqua5 Ordo5 Perditio5
one wildcard itemGolemPlacer metadata 32767 recipe expanded over exact legacy metas 0..7; central stack retained with byte advanced=1; shears/glowstone/gunpowder/jar/brain

advanced_golem_demetadata.runtime_semantics: Each registry-specific recipe accepts exactly one flattened legacy material item, copies that central ItemStack, and adds byte tag advanced=1. The union of the eight catalysts equals the original valid metadata domain 0..7.

notes: The historical runtime-registration ledger is fully statically mapped at 258/258.
Arcane totals are 104 shaped plus 5 shapeless registrations; 84 literal shaped call sites expand to 104 registrations through loops.
Eight JSON files for AdvancedGolem are implementation expansion only and count as one historical source registration.
The 18 ThaumcraftApi.addSmeltingBonus registrations are a separate mechanic and are not furnace recipes.
Runtime loading for the exact v11.63.61 source state remains NOT VERIFIED until Java 17 build and runGameTestServer succeed.

counting_correction.reason: The old ledger counted 109 Arcane records. ConfigRecipes actually creates 104 shaped and 5 shapeless Arcane registrations after expanding the Banner and PrimalArrow loops.
